nasb.text: The disciples were amazed at His words. But Jesus *answered again and *said to them, “Children, how hard it is to enter the kingdom of God!

esv.text: And the disciples were amazed at his words. But Jesus said to them again, “Children, how difficult it is  to enter the kingdom of God!

cnv.text: 門徒都希奇他的話，耶穌又對他們說：“孩子們哪，要進　神的國，是多麼困難！

ccb.text: 门徒听了感到惊奇，耶稣便再次对他们说：“孩子们，进上帝的国多么难啊！

csbs.text: 门徒们因这些话，就惊讶不已。耶稣又对他们说：“孩子们，进入神的国是多么困难！
